submitHints.fileRequired: Choose a file or paste readable text before saving.
submitHints.ocrRequired: Choose a photo and review the extracted text before saving.
submitHints.journalLocked: Reach Lv{{level}} before saving a journal entry.
submitHints.journalLimit: Free journal entries are used up. Other capture modes are still available.

hero.title: Save a note or source
hero.subtitle: Journal · note · link · photo · file
hero.speechSaved: Saved. You can see it on the graph.
hero.speechSavedOcr: Your photo note is saved. It is a private piece in your graph.
hero.speechSavedRecords: Saved. You can find it in your records.
hero.speechIdle: Write briefly or choose a source. We will organize it so you can find it later.

mode.moreHint: Shows note, link, photo, and file options.
mode.lessHint: Hides extra capture options and returns to Journal if needed.

journal.label: Journal
journal.help: Write today's reflection. It saves to your records, with optional SecondB reflection.

memo.label: Note
memo.help: Write a short note. Tags and filing are added automatically when you save.

linkclip.label: Link
linkclip.help: Paste a URL or saved article text. We will recognize the source type.

ocr.label: Photo
ocr.help: Choose a photo or use the camera. We will read the text from the image.

file.label: File
file.help: Choose a PDF, DOCX, or text file. We save the readable text.

formatSaved.shared: Saved your new format and shared it with your formats.

firstRun.hint: One sentence becomes your first saved record. You can find it again in Records.

saved.title: Lumen saved a new piece
saved.ocrBody: A private piece in your graph.
saved.seeGraphHint: Opens the graph and highlights this piece.
saved.seeOcrGraphHint: Opens the graph and highlights this photo note.
saved.seeRecordsHint: Opens your records so you can find this entry again.
saved.recordsOwnership: One sentence is enough for today. This entry is in Records, so you can reread it and include it in an export later.
saved.recordsAiOptIn: SecondB only reflects on this entry when you turn that switch on.
saved.storagePending: Saved, but the backup file copy didn't upload this time. Your text is kept safely.

proposal.heading: Suggested format
proposal.prompt: No saved format fits this well. Want SecondB to suggest one?

limit.title: Free journal entries used up
limit.body: You have written all {{limit}} free journal entries. Everything you have written so far stays, and you can reread it anytime.
limit.helper: Note, link, file, and photo capture stay open with no limit.

fields.bodyPlaceholder: What's on your mind today? One sentence is enough.

advisor.label: Ask SecondB on this entry
advisor.helper: Off by default. Turn on only when you want a reflection back.
advisor.lockedHelper: Reflections on entries unlock with the Brain plan. Tap to view plans.

linkClip.label: Link or saved article
linkClip.pasteOfferHint: Fills the box with your last copied content. It is read only when you tap.

inputs.imagePlaceholder: Pick an image to place extracted text here.

ocrReview.heading: Review before saving
ocrReview.disclosure: This photo goes to a text-reading service only to read its text. 2nd-B does not keep the image or use it to train anything.
ocrReview.privateAfterApprove: After you approve it, only the editable text is saved as your private record.
ocrReview.body: Edit the extracted text, then approve it before saving.
ocrReview.approved: My extracted text is approved for saving.
ocrReview.submitHint: Review and approve the extracted text before saving.

image.dataUsageHint: Extracting text from photos may incur data charges. Wi-Fi is recommended.

file.attachedNoPreview: File attached. Text preview is not available.
file.dataUsageHint: Uploading files may incur data charges. Wi-Fi is recommended.

tags.title: Hashtags
tags.emptyHelper: Leave empty and SecondB will tag it on save, or add your own with +.

imageOpen.title: Couldn't open that image
imageOpen.message: We couldn't pull that image in. Please try again in a moment.

cameraPermission.title: Camera permission is off
cameraPermission.message: Allow camera access in your device settings, or choose an image from your library.

ocrEmptyResult.title: No text found
ocrEmptyResult.message: We couldn't find readable text in this image. Try a closer, well-lit photo.

ocrRead.title: Couldn't read the text
ocrRead.message: We couldn't read the text from that image. Try again with a clearer photo.

ocrTooLarge.title: Image is too large
ocrTooLarge.message: This photo is too large to read safely. Choose a smaller image or crop it, then try again.

ocrUnsupportedType.title: Image type is not supported
ocrUnsupportedType.message: Choose a JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, or HEIF image, then try again.

ocrMissingData.title: Image data is missing
ocrMissingData.message: We couldn't read this image file from the picker. Choose it again or try a different image.

ocrInvalidData.title: Image data is damaged
ocrInvalidData.message: This image data is not readable. Choose the image again or use a different file.

fileOpen.title: Couldn't open that file
fileOpen.message: We couldn't open that file. Pick another one or try again in a moment.

journalSave.title: Couldn't save your entry
journalSave.message: We couldn't save today's piece. What you wrote is still here. Please try again.

pieceSave.title: Couldn't save your piece
pieceSave.message: We couldn't save it yet. What you entered is still here. Please try again.

proposeEmpty.title: No format to suggest
proposeEmpty.message: Couldn't draft a new format for this one.

proposeFailed.title: Couldn't draft a format
proposeFailed.message: We couldn't draft a new format right now. Please try again in a moment.

formatSave.title: Couldn't save the format
formatSave.message: We couldn't save the new format. Your proposal is still here. Please try again.
